  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Section contains an explicit contribution claim (FastNav hybrid index) and a gap statement (recall of in-memory methods at storage costs of compressed methods); reviewing requires assessing whether these are well-formed and internally grounded.",
    "R1.2": "The logical arc from classical foundations → three extension directions → specific prior works → FastNav positioning must be checked for coherence; the framing of FastNav's novelty depends on how the prior-work categorization holds up.",
    "R1.4": "This is a high-stakes dimension: ScaNN already introduces anisotropic vector quantization and DiskANN already achieves disk-resident billion-scale graph search — the claimed novelty of combining both must be scrutinized carefully against the cited baselines.",
    "R1.7": "Five specific citations carry attributed factual claims (e.g., DiskANN year listed as 2019, NSG navigability guarantees, ScaNN score-aware partitioning); each attribution and year needs accuracy verification."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Is this primarily a writing quality review (sentence-level clarity and prose polish), or a technical and scholarly review (accuracy of attributed claims, citation correctness, and novelty positioning against prior work)?"
}

rationale.R1.1: Section contains an explicit contribution claim (FastNav hybrid index) and a gap statement (recall of in-memory methods at storage costs of compressed methods); reviewing requires assessing whether these are well-formed and internally grounded.
rationale.R1.2: The logical arc from classical foundations → three extension directions → specific prior works → FastNav positioning must be checked for coherence; the framing of FastNav's novelty depends on how the prior-work categorization holds up.
rationale.R1.4: This is a high-stakes dimension: ScaNN already introduces anisotropic vector quantization and DiskANN already achieves disk-resident billion-scale graph search — the claimed novelty of combining both must be scrutinized carefully against the cited baselines.
rationale.R1.7: Five specific citations carry attributed factual claims (e.g., DiskANN year listed as 2019, NSG navigability guarantees, ScaNN score-aware partitioning); each attribution and year needs accuracy verification.

parsed.clarification_question: Is this primarily a writing quality review (sentence-level clarity and prose polish), or a technical and scholarly review (accuracy of attributed claims, citation correctness, and novelty positioning against prior work)?
